calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Sep-29-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant To C.C.P. Section
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter is on Calendar this day for Default Judgment Hearing as to Defendant Robert O. Wolf, also known as Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. also known as Genesis Dental Group, Inc., Defendant Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. Inc., and Defendant Aesthetic Management Corporation.

Dept. 505; Judge: Sylvia L. Husing; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:31 p.m., and concluded at 2:42 p.m. (D505)

David Julian Cook, Esq., appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Robert O. Wolf, also known as Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. also known as Genesis Dental Group, Inc. not appearing.
Defendant Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. Inc. not appearing.
Defendant Aesthetic Management Corporation not appearing.
Witness for the Plaintiff Kent Alleyne Henry was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.
Jamie Onuki; CSR #13904 for Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Collections filed May 11, 2023.
Amended Proof of Substituted Service as to Defendant Robert O. Wolf, also known as Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. also known as Genesis Dental Group, Inc. effectuated on June 5, 2023.
2nd Amended Proof of Substituted Service as to Defendant Robert O. Wolf, also known as Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. also known as Genesis Dental Group, Inc. effectuated on June 5, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Robert O. Wolf, also known as Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. also known as Genesis Dental Group, Inc., Defendant Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. Inc. and Defendant Aesthetic Management Corporation on July 12, 2023.
Does I through X dismissed on July 12, 2023.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:

Exhibit A: Statement of Account
Exhibit B: Written Terms and Conditions of Plaintiff.
Exhibit C: Written Terms of Contract.

Witness is examined by the Court.
The matter is submitted.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. and against Defendant Robert O. Wolf, also known as Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. also known as Genesis Dental Group, Inc., Defendant Robert O. Wolf, D.D.S. Inc. and Defendant Aesthetic Management Corporation as follows:

Damages: $33,664.10
Interest: $931.22
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $589.90

Proposed Judgment signed and filed this date.
